summary: Order Assistant issues 53-62 implemented and tested. AI资料收集箱 refactor issues 63-73 are implemented, integrated, and triage-fixed for single-input intake, upload crash, busy overlay, anchor preservation, counts, clearing/history, full review rendering, grouped review/draft actions, business-language draft summaries, and removal of supplier message drafts.

53.title: Order Assistant Data Contract
53.notes: Added assistant runs, suggestions, review requests, change drafts, review-needed fields, model usage, Chinese labels, and response validation.

54.title: Order Assistant Background Runs
54.notes: Added queued/running/succeeded/failed lifecycle, demo mode, usage logging per agent, and failed-run retry.

55.title: Order Assistant Router And Demo Agents
55.notes: Implemented task-template/source-rule router and fixed specialist agents with isolated outputs.

56.title: Order Assistant Entry And Drawer
56.notes: Added order-bound assistant entry and contextual AI buttons without adding a standalone navigation section.

57.title: Order Assistant Review Request To Change Draft Flow
57.notes: Run outputs create review requests first; approved review requests create change drafts; confirmed drafts write only selected-order data; admin can override final values.

58.title: Order Assistant Structured Intake Drafts
58.notes: Implemented Chinese Excel goods-list extraction into draft candidates and review-needed fields using the provided sample shape.

59.title: Order Assistant Compliance And Goods Review
59.notes: Implemented order/goods checks and compliance keyword risks for wood, food contact, animal/plant, children, and textile signals.

60.title: Order Assistant Document Draft Agent
60.notes: Implemented document blocker checks and commercial invoice/packing list draft candidates without generating official documents.

61.title: Order Assistant Profit Risk Agent
61.notes: Implemented missing-fee, costs-without-charges, low-margin, and exchange-rate risk checks.

62.title: Order Assistant DeepSeek Integration
62.notes: Added DeepSeek JSON adapter gated by administrator confirmation, with demo fallback when no API key is configured and invalid JSON rejection.

verification.result: Ran 99 tests in 1.736s; 3 failures after issue 73 test updates. Missing standalone AI资料收集箱 admin navigation/page and /assistant redirect target while issues 63-72 are still in progress.

Logged in as demo admin, verified AI资料收集箱 navigation/page, source labels, order preselection link with #ai-intake-workspace, enabled AI处理资料 after order selection, and no browser console warnings/errors.
Verified single text input, multi-file upload control, busy overlay, active counts, history modal close button, and no browser console warnings/errors.

Verified AI资料收集箱 entry page and supplier-message removal. Full browser smoke skipped because Playwright browser binary is not installed; selected-order smoke could not run because the local dev database has no selectable orders.

63.title: AI资料收集箱 Section Shell
63.notes: Dedicated AI资料收集箱 navigation section and order-scoped intake form implemented.

64.title: AI资料收集箱 Source Bundle Parsing
64.notes: Mixed source bundle parsing implemented for Phase 1 source types, with OCR left for Phase 2.

65.title: AI资料收集箱 Results And Matching
65.notes: Intake summary and Goods Line matching/missing-line reporting implemented.

66.title: AI资料收集箱 Safe Batch Import
66.notes: Same-category safe package/tracking fields can be confirmed as grouped imports.

67.title: AI资料收集箱 Customs Goods Version
67.notes: 报关版本 storage and confirmation path implemented separately from detailed Goods Lines.

68.title: AI资料收集箱 Review Request Cleanup
68.notes: New UI flow removes 需跟进; backend rejects new needs_followup updates while legacy rows stay readable.

69.title: AI资料收集箱 Business-Language Draft Display
69.notes: Draft cards render operation-oriented business language instead of raw JSON.

70.title: AI资料收集箱 Supplier Message Draft Removal
70.notes: Supplier message draft generation, UI panel, POST route, schema creation, and summary output were removed because all sources now feed structured intake only.

71.title: AI资料收集箱 Contextual Buttons
71.notes: Contextual AI buttons now link into AI资料收集箱 with the current Import Order preselected.

72.title: AI资料收集箱 Anchor Preservation
72.notes: Assistant run, retry, review, draft, and supplier-message actions return to the AI资料收集箱 workspace anchor.

73.title: AI资料收集箱 Regression Cleanup
73.notes: Updated regression tests for AI资料收集箱 as the admin-only primary workflow; final full test suite passes.
